# Rsm

**Summary**: A mathematical technique used to perform global sensitivity analysis on model parameters.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] applied RSM to conduct a global sensitivity analysis of the input parameters in the Marrat Formation modeling.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Sensitivity analysis indicated that sediment supply and carbonate production exert greater control than sea level changes. ([[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024, p. 17]])
